warnings.text: Worker detected in close proximity to active machinery without proper lockout/tagout procedure. Immediate intervention required.
Person reaching dangerously close to rotating blade guard. Left hand within 15cm of hazard zone.
Person entered lockout/tagout zone while machine is energized. Immediate danger.
Person not wearing required safety goggles while operating grinding station.
Welding operation detected without proper face shield. Arc flash exposure risk.
Person leaning into conveyor belt zone. Immediate entanglement risk detected.
Hard hat slightly tilted, not fully secured. Minor PPE adjustment needed.
Person climbing on racking system without fall protection harness.
Two workers in close proximity near press brake. Insufficient clearance for safe operation.
Person standing slightly outside designated walkway. Minor positional deviation.
